title: Dialog Batin di Bioskop Sepi
theme: Menggali sudut pandang baru tentang kecemasan pribadi dan tekanan hidup melalui refleksi diri yang sinis namun lucu saat menonton film lama.

cover.prompt: A cinematic shot of a computer monitor displaying abstract, complex data patterns, emitting a soft, tired blue luminescence. The surrounding workspace is gently illuminated by ambient light, creating a serene and thoughtful atmosphere. The composition emphasizes the monitor and subtle objects on the desk, conveying a sense of quiet overwhelm and mental exhaustion. A strong, indistinct silhouette of a person is subtly suggested in the frame, observing the screen. Focus on environmental mood rather than specific features.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, gentle color grading

meta.plan_summary: A young professional, overwhelmed by work and social pressures, seeks escape in an old, forgotten cinema. Watching an absurd B-movie alone, his cynical internal monologue projects onto the film's characters, turning the cinema into a dark comedic stage for self-reflection. A ridiculous scene in the film triggers a realization about the absurdity of his own problems, leading to a lighter, more accepting view of his anxieties.
